message:
fix(cache): invalidate compile cache for CTE temp table scans (#86) + cleanup debug prints

CTE temp tables have different root pages on each materialization, but
the VDBE compile cache keyed by SQL text returned stale programs with
old root pages. Added invalidate_compiled_cache() and call it before
scanning named tables in execute_join_select.

Also: fix SwissIndex.keys() → .iter().map(), remove debug eprintln from
connection.rs and engine.rs left by concurrent agent, fix
Connection::open_in_memory → open(":memory:") in tests. 19 new
conformance oracle tests from concurrent agent (152 total, all pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
